blockingIssues.description: pattern_learning.rs line 1087: MemoryEntry.repository set to String::new() instead of self.repository.clone(), causing repository-scoped queries to fail. NOTE: Working tree has fix but committed code still has bug.
decay.rs line 56: calculate_decay() returns decay factor > 1.0 when now < last_reinforcement (negative elapsed time), violating documented [0.0, 1.0] range. Also affects line 80 (days_since).
MemoryEntry lacks confidence, deprecation_info, and superseded_by fields. The deprecation module cannot integrate with the memory system as specified - it's standalone but non-functional.

triple_stream.rs line 520: BM25 search generates random Uuid::new_v4() instead of actual memory entry IDs, breaking RRF fusion across streams. Also line 518: RecallResult has no memory_entry_id field for correlation.
cross_encoder_rerank.rs line 518: RerankableCandidates trait creates MemoryEntry with empty fields but is never called (dead code). triple_stream.rs line 777: Same BM25 UUID bug as triple-stream.

lib.rs line 681: search() method does NOT filter by source_episode_id even though MemoryQuery has this field defined. Provenance-based search filtering is only available via get_by_provenance(), not general search().

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on magic numbers: 'Never hardcode magic numbers - always load from .swell/settings.json' is documented but no crates currently implement this pattern. Either implement settings loading in a reference crate or clarify the guideline applies only when settings.json exists and is intentionally optional.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-pattern-learning hardcodes PromotionThresholds values that match settings.json. This is systemic - no crates currently load settings.json.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document async_trait::async_trait usage - all async trait methods in swell-memory use this pattern but it's not documented. Workers spend time discovering this pattern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross_encoder_rerank.rs uses #[async_trait] pub trait CrossEncoderReranker. Skill review found workers not following async_trait pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention for RecallService/MemoryEntry correlation: RecallService operates on conversation_logs, not directly on memory entries. triple_stream tries to use recall for keyword search on memory but there's no linkage. Document that recall module has no field linking results to memory entry IDs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-triple-stream-retrieval review discovered RecallResult has session_id, task_id, agent_role, action, start_time, end_time but no memory_entry_id. This mismatch wasn't documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Fix skillName values: memory-sqlite-store uses 'rust-worker' skill which doesn't exist. Should be 'rust'. This caused worker to fall back to default skill.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: features.json skillName='rust-worker' vs AGENTS.md skill table showing 'rust' skill exists.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Working tree has modifications to pattern_learning.rs that may address the repository bug, but these are not committed. The committed code still has the bug at line 1087.

Feature review showed search() doesn't filter by source_episode_id - same root cause as memory-sqlite-store blocking issue. get_by_provenance() works correctly but general search doesn't support provenance filtering.
AGENTS.md says 'Never hardcode magic numbers - always load from .swell/settings.json', but no crates currently load settings.json.

commonBugAcrossFeatures.description: memory-pattern-learning and mem-scoping share the same bug: pattern_learning.rs creates MemoryEntry with repository: String::new() instead of self.repository.clone(). mem-scoping is now fixed (commit 024eda6) but memory-pattern-learning still has bug in committed code.
